title: Marriage Act (Designation of Foreign Countries) Notice, 1998
title_en: Marriage Act (Designation of Foreign Countries) Notice, 1998

provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Marriage Act (Designation of Foreign Countries) Notice.

The State of Japan is hereby designated to be a country to which the provisions of section 8 of the Law of Marriage Act shall apply.
